name: form-formisch-textarea

Item Details:

## form-formisch-textarea
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** @formisch/react, valibot

visual_summary: The Formischem Textarea is a visually appealing text input field with a formischem theme. When a developer wants to add a user-friendly and aesthetic form field to their application with a formischem touch, this is the perfect component to use. It can be styled to fit various themes and designs.
generation_prompt:

When a developer wants to add a user-friendly and aesthetic form field to their application with a formischem touch, this is the perfect component to use. Interactions: 
Tags: form, field, textarea, input, formischem

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
